word: G5229 - ὑπεραίρομαι - hyperaíromai - hoop-er-ah'-ee-rom-ahee - Exalt self

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
exalt self, be exalted above measure, to become haughty
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Middle voice from G5228 and G142; to raise oneself over, that is, (figuratively) to become haughty: - exalt self, be exalted above measure.
